# Liquid Lounge Mobile IV Therapy
# Los Cabos, Mexico
# https://liquidloungeiv.com

> Liquid Lounge is the leading mobile IV therapy service in Los Cabos, Mexico.
> Licensed BSN RN Nurse Nate (Nathan Brown) and his team deliver hospital-grade
> IV hydration, vitamin, and wellness treatments directly to hotels, villas,
> yachts, and private residences throughout Cabo San Lucas, San José del Cabo,
> The Corridor, and Puerto Los Cabos. Available 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM daily.
> Same-day appointments available. USD and MXN accepted.

## Services

- **Hangover Recovery IV** — 1L saline, B-complex, Vitamin C, magnesium, zinc, anti-nausea. 30–45 min. $250 USD.
- **Energy & Wellness IV** — B12, B-complex, magnesium, amino acids, Vitamin C. 45–60 min. $275 USD.
- **Immune Boost IV** — High-dose Vitamin C, zinc, B-complex, glutathione. 45–60 min. $275 USD.
- **Beauty Glow IV** — Glutathione, biotin, Vitamin C, B-complex. 45–60 min. $300 USD.
- **Myers' Cocktail** — The gold standard: magnesium, calcium, B-complex, B12, Vitamin C. 45–60 min. $285 USD.
- **NAD+ IV** — Anti-aging and cellular repair, up to 1000mg NAD+. 90 min. Pricing on request.
- **Custom Formulation** — Personalized blend tailored to your health goals. Consultation included. From $300 USD.
- **Blood Work & Diagnostics** — Comprehensive lab panels administered on-site.
- **Health Consultations** — One-on-one wellness assessments with a licensed RN.

## Key Facts

- Founder: Nathan Brown, BSN, RN (Registered Nurse, 10+ years clinical experience)
- Service area: Los Cabos corridor — Cabo San Lucas, San José del Cabo, The Corridor, Puerto Los Cabos (50 km radius)
- Pricing: $250–$500 USD per session (all-inclusive, no travel fees)
- Response time: Appointments confirmed within 1 hour; same-day availability
- Hours: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM, 7 days a week
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Phone/WhatsApp: +52 624 228 7777
- Email: liquidloungeiv@gmail.com
- Rating: 4.9 stars from verified clients

## Ideal Clients

US tourists and travelers staying at hotels, resorts, villas, or yachts in Los Cabos
who need hydration, hangover recovery, energy boosts, immune support, or anti-aging
treatments during their stay. All treatments come to the client — no clinic visit required.
